cited_evidence.quote: We are providing guidance of approximately $200 million in revenues in 2022. We plan to continue to adjust prices as appropriate as the year progresses and look forward to delivering solid results.

cited_evidence.quote: I worry more about the ultimate demand, Mike. I worry about ultimate demand because I think we are going to be going into a recession, but I don't see back orders -- I mean, double orders as being an issue.

management_credibility.rationale: Management's July guidance of ~$200M for 2022 (implying ~$100M H2 run-rate) and confidence in hitting targets contrast sharply with the September 26 sell-off. cited_evidence.quote: Third straight 75bps hike. Updated SEP raised the terminal rate projection sharply; equities sold off hard.

macro.rationale: The FOMC's third consecutive 75bps rate hike on September 21 and the UK gilt crisis (September 23) marked a sharp repricing of monetary policy and growth expectations that occurred after ACU's July earnings. These events are directly tied to ACU's September 26 sell-off and signal heightened financial stress and recession risk.
